P

peek() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.CircularArrayQueue
Returns the element at front of this queue without removing it from the queue.
peek() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue
 
peek() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.queues.PriorityQueue
Returns but does not remove the item at the front of this priority queue.
peek() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.queues.Queue
Returns but does not remove the item at the front of this queue.
peek() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.stacks.Stack
Returns the top item from this stack without removing it.
peek() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.stacks.StackImpl
 
pointer - Variable in class michaelryan.struct.queues.CircularArrayQueue.CircularArrayQueueIterator
 
pop() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.stacks.Stack
Removes the top item from this stack and returns it.
pop() - Method in class michaelryan.struct.stacks.StackImpl
 
priority - Variable in class michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue.Node
 
PriorityQueue<T> - Interface in michaelryan.struct.queues
A priority queue.
push(T) - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.stacks.Stack
Puts a new item onto the top of this stack.
push(T) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.stacks.StackImpl
